source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/230926 기술문서 & 임상평가 보완 리뷰 2 (with 컨설팅)/CE MDR TD 보완_230926/A-TCF-5-157 Clinical Evaluation/Appendix I Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report (rev.1)_마지막수정.docx

document.title: Checklist for the release of the clinical evaluation report

sourceSummary.oneLine: Checklist for releasing a clinical evaluation report for the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to verify that the clinical evaluation report contains adequate clinical data, equivalence discussion, PMS/PMCF considerations, GSPR conformity, residual risk conclusions, evaluator qualification, CVs, and declarations of interest before release.
keyPoints: The product name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector and the model names are A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW.
The checklist was prepared, reviewed, and approved on December 22, 2022.
The checklist states this is a CE certification process.
Clinical Evaluation Report A-TCF-5-118 is stated as issued on 22.12.2022 as Rev. 0.
Conformity to MDR GSPR 1 and 8 is addressed at Clause 4.6 of the Clinical Evaluation Report.

concepts.name: Clinical evaluation report release checklist
concepts.evidence: The following aspects should be checked for the release of a clinical evaluation report:

concepts.name: CE certification process
concepts.evidence: No. This is CE certification process.

concepts.name: Equivalence demonstration
concepts.evidence: If equivalence is claimed, - is demonstration of equivalence included in the report?

concepts.name: PMS/PMCF data
concepts.pageTarget: Post-Market Surveillance and Post-Market Clinical Follow-up
concepts.evidence: has the latest PMS/ PMCF data been taken into consideration and has it been summarised and referenced in the report?

concepts.name: State of the art
concepts.pageTarget: Clinical Evaluation State of the Art
concepts.evidence: is current knowledge/ the state of the art summarised in the report and is it adequately substantiated by literature?

concepts.name: General Safety and Performance Requirements
concepts.pageTarget: MDR General Safety and Performance Requirements
concepts.evidence: Is conformity to each of the relevant General Safety and Performance Requirements (MDR GSPR 1, 8) clearly stated

concepts.name: Evaluator qualification
concepts.evidence: Yes. Evaluator is a medical doctor who uses our products and his CV is attached.

concepts.name: Declaration of interests
concepts.evidence: Declaration of interests is signed by evaluator.
